# umvc3_recomp - ReXGlue Recompiled Project
# Generated by: rexglue init
#
# This file is SDK-managed. Running 'rexglue migrate' will overwrite it.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)
project(umvc3_recomp LANGUAGES C CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

set(REXSDK_DIR "" CACHE PATH "Path to rexglue-sdk source tree OR prebuilt install prefix")
if(REXSDK_DIR)
    if(EXISTS "${REXSDK_DIR}/CMakeLists.txt")
        # Source tree: build as subdirectory
        add_subdirectory("${REXSDK_DIR}" rexglue-sdk)
    else()
        # Prebuilt package: add as prefix path for find_package
        list(PREPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${REXSDK_DIR}")
        find_package(rexglue REQUIRED CONFIG)
    endif()
else()
    find_package(rexglue QUIET CONFIG)
    if(NOT rexglue_FOUND)
        message(FATAL_ERROR
            "ReXGlue SDK not found. Either:\n"
            "  - Set REXSDK_DIR to the rexglue-sdk source tree or prebuilt install prefix\n"
            "  - Install the SDK package and ensure it is on CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH")
    endif()
endif()

# Third-party: dlmalloc
add_library(dlmalloc STATIC dlmalloc/dlmalloc.c)
target_include_directories(dlmalloc PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/dlmalloc)
target_compile_definitions(dlmalloc PUBLIC
    MSPACES=1
    USE_LOCKS=1
    ONLY_MSPACES=1
    HAVE_MORECORE=0
    ABORT_ON_ASSERT_FAILURE=0
    USE_DL_PREFIX=1
    FOOTERS=0
)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(dlmalloc PRIVATE /wd4244 /wd4267 /wd4146 /wd4996)
else()
    target_compile_options(dlmalloc PRIVATE
        -Wno-incompatible-pointer-types
        -Wno-unused-value
        -Wno-shift-negative-value
    )
endif()

# Sources
set(UMVC3RECOMP_SOURCES
    src/main.cpp
    src/bdengine/heap.cpp
    src/bdengine/file_hooks.cpp
    src/bdengine/file_cache.cpp
    src/bdengine/ramdisk.cpp
    src/bdengine/keybinds.cpp
    src/bdengine/assert_override.cpp
    src/bdengine/game_patches.cpp
    src/bdengine/render_hooks.cpp
    src/bdengine/overlay/console_overlay.cpp
    src/bdengine/overlay/debug_overlay.cpp
    src/bdengine/overlay/settings_overlay.cpp
)

# Include generated code if codegen has been run
if(EXISTS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generated/sources.cmake")
    include(generated/sources.cmake)
    list(APPEND UMVC3RECOMP_SOURCES ${GENERATED_SOURCES})
endif()

if(WIN32)
    add_executable(umvc3_recomp WIN32 ${UMVC3RECOMP_SOURCES})
else()
    add_executable(umvc3_recomp ${UMVC3RECOMP_SOURCES})
endif()

target_include_directories(umvc3_recomp PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generated
)

target_link_libraries(umvc3_recomp PRIVATE
    rex::core
    rex::system
    rex::kernel
    rex::graphics
    rex::ui
    dlmalloc
)

target_compile_definitions(umvc3_recomp PRIVATE REX_SOFT_ASSERT_ALWAYS=1)

# Allow our object-file definitions of __imp__NtCreateFile etc. to win over
# rexkerneld.lib and the Windows ntdll.lib import thunks (same symbol name,
# different semantics). First definition encountered wins with /FORCE:MULTIPLE.
target_link_options(umvc3_recomp PRIVATE "LINKER:/FORCE:MULTIPLE")

# Platform entry point, ReXApp source, and platform-specific settings
rexglue_configure_target(umvc3_recomp)


# Codegen target - run 'cmake --build . --target umvc3_recomp_codegen'
add_custom_target(umvc3_recomp_codegen
    COMMAND $<TARGET_FILE:rex::rexglue> codegen ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/umvc3_recomp_config.toml
    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    COMMENT "Generating recompiled code for umvc3_recomp"
    VERBATIM
)
